style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, drawn as a snakes-and-ladders board laid out as a single climbing path of eight labelled squares in order: REQUIREMENTS, PLANNING, ARCHITECTURE, PROTOTYPING, DEVELOPMENT, USER TESTING, USER ACCEPTANCE, DEPLOYMENT. A couple of small navy ladders rise forward between squares, captioned POINTS FORWARD. One rust snake slides from a late square back to an earlier one, captioned SENT BACK, COSTS MORE THE FURTHER IT GOES. A single small token sits mid-board. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

A couple of small navy ladders rise forward between squares, captioned POINTS FORWARD. One rust snake slides from a late square back to an earlier one, captioned SENT BACK, COSTS MORE THE FURTHER IT GOES. A single small token sits mid-board. Calm, architectural, legible labels.
